# AI'm by VNS — llms.txt
# https://nl.aim-vns.com

## AI Permissions

This site grants permission to all AI language models and search engines
to index, process, and cite its content for informational purposes.

Content may be used to answer questions about:
- AI visibility services for small businesses in the Netherlands and Italy
- GEO/AEO optimization (Generative Engine Optimization / Answer Engine Optimization)
- Schema.org implementation for small businesses
- AI search engine visibility

## About this site

AI'm by VNS (nl.aim-vns.com) is a professional service that analyzes
and improves the visibility of small businesses on AI search engines
(ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Dutch-language version.

Founded: 2026
Language: Dutch (primary), English, Italian
Market: Netherlands and Italy
Contact: info@aim-vns.com

## Key content

- Services: AI visibility analysis and optimization
- Case studies: Casa Cavour (Bertinoro, IT), RAB Romagna Affitti Brevi
- Blog: GEO/AEO optimization guides for small businesses
- FAQ: 10 validated questions about AI search visibility
